visual_state: 3 selected visuals with healthy pressure and low fatigue

visual_decision: Keep the three-beat sequence and make the first caption short enough to preserve velocity.
next_gate: Verify first spread so chronology leads and source apparatus follows.

addiction_gap: The lone bottleneck map explains the old problem but does not yet make the pre-Transformer world feel lived-in.

next_gate: Test one source-texture candidate during prose-around-figures pass.

visual_state: 1 mechanism visual, too open, caption risk

visual_decision: Keep the mechanism, shorten the reader-facing caption, and move exact provenance to a nearby note.
next_gate: Create short-caption variant before render.

visual_state: 1 evidence visual, too open, caption risk

visual_decision: Keep the visual if the caption blocks product guarantees and preserves surprise.
next_gate: Rewrite surrounding prose so the chart raises the question, not the answer.

visual_state: 1 mechanism visual, too open, caption risk

visual_decision: Use one landscape, one surprising source card, and one local mechanism; demote extras to appendix if identities blur.

visual_state: 6 visuals, dense but workable, source texture
